---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 💡 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 🎯 Problem/Use Case

Describe the problem this feature would solve or the use case it addresses.

**Example**: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## 💭 Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this feature working.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or features?

## 📸 Mockups/Examples

If applicable, add mockups, screenshots, or examples from other tools.

## 🎨 UI/UX Considerations

How should this feature be presented to users?

- [ ] New button/control
- [ ] Settings option
- [ ] Keyboard shortcut
- [ ] Automatic behavior
- [ ] Other: ___________

## 🔧 Technical Considerations

Any technical details or constraints to consider?

## 📊 Priority

How important is this feature to you?

- [ ] Critical - Can't use extension without it
- [ ] High - Would significantly improve experience
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Minor enhancement

## 👥 Who Would Benefit?

Who would benefit from this feature?

- [ ] Students
- [ ] Teachers
- [ ] Self-learners
- [ ] Everyone
- [ ] Other: ___________

## 🔗 Related Issues

Are there any related issues or feature requests?

## ✔️ Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I have checked the roadmap in CHANGELOG.md
- [ ] I have provided a clear use case
- [ ] I have considered the impact on existing features
